name: Poppy Playtime chapter 5
description:
STIOP IT 😭

This is supposed to be a rant. That you can communicate on 😔

I am most DEFINITELY gonna be making a botnabout this soon.

Holy shucks I loved it. Don't know bout everyone else but me personally. The game was like every other chapter mostly. Two enemies the main one and a secondary one. Puzzles and mostly needed filller.

I've seen the complaints people have. I mean. You do tou but like. They complaints are a wittle funny. Mostly the fact people grt upset when a story game gives big filler before revealing the big bad... And some people saying Lily Lovebraids part is out of nowhere.

I mean kinda. But if you really played the game and tried to find the tapes or notes it would explain why she's there. And more importantly her part is more than likely meant to bring anticipation about who the "Special guest" is gonna be. Then in the moment he appears.. The Prototype. I personally was geeked. Freaked. And everything else.

Some people hated the design some liked it. I liked it. He looked like a Jack-in-the-box since we know he's a toy. And the fact he has legs shows he really had been stealing things, parts and using it as his own. Which is why he took Mommy during her chapter. I guess it's overlooked for a good reason. The game was long. For those who died more than 5 times per chase 😭

Either way. The chapter made be bust when I saw Dr Sawyer himself get revived by us! That shit surprised me.

That's all. Lily Lovebraids is a goated character flip off if I had the image it would've been 3fs flicking you off
creator: Cannibonnie
